message:
fix: address bugs from fresh eyes code review

- Fix Date handling in confidence-scorer.ts and conflict-resolution.service.ts
  to handle both Date objects and ISO strings from JSON deserialization
- Fix route ordering in conflicts.ts - move /resolution/* routes before
  /:conflictId to prevent route conflicts
- Fix route ordering in handoffs.ts - move static routes before parameterized
  routes for same reason
- Fix memory leak in handoff.service.ts - actually use removeFromIndex()
  to clean up indices when handoffs complete
- Add missing workspace:git channel type to channels.ts

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -265,6 +265,7 @@ export function getChannelResourceId(channel: Channel): string | undefined {
     case "workspace:reservations":
     case "workspace:conflicts":
     case "workspace:graph":
+    case "workspace:git":
     case "workspace:handoffs":
       return channel.workspaceId;
     case "user:mail":
